raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un wiſsch aprakke to kah-
dá Eeleiſá tahs Moaba Semmes/
Bet-Pevarn pretti/ un ue weenâ
irr wiſſa Rappu ſunaht dab-
bujs/ lihds ſchai patchai Deenai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Un Mohsus bija ſunts un
diwidefinits Gaddus wezz/ kad
wiſſch nomirre/ wiſſa Azz ne
bija aptumschota tappuſi/ un
wiſſa Spehks ne bija iſnihzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un Iſraëta Behrni aprau-
daja Mohsu Moaba Klatjumês
trihsdefinits Deenas/ un tahs
Noschehschannas Raudu- Dee-
nas pahr Mohsu tappe pabeig-
tas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Un Josuüs Nunna Dehls
btja pilus ar to Garru tahs Bud-
ribas/ jo Mohsus bij ſawas
Rohkas us wiſſu lizzis/ un I-
fraëta Behrni klaſſija wiſſam/
un darrija ka tas KUNGGL
Mohſum bij pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un tahds Braueets ceefsch
Iſraëta wairs ne zehlahs/ itt ka
Mohsus/ kas to KUNGGL buhtu
atsinnis no Waiga lihds Wan-
gam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Wiſſas tannis Sihmes
un Brihnunıs/ us ko wiſſan tas
KUNGS bii fuhtijs Eqiotes-
Semmê darriht/ pee Waraus un
pee wiſſein wiſſa Kalpeen/ un
pee wiſſas wiſſa Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Un wiſſa tahda ſtipra Roh-
kâ/ un wiſſas tahdas leelâs Iſ-
trubzinaschanas/ ko Mohsus dar-
rija preecſch wiſſa Iſraëta
Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Deewâ eeſpehzina un ſtubbina Josuü ts apfohlita
Semmi uhsaemt : 1. Un tohs Peewa Ban-
ſlus tikkuſchi turreht : 7. Josuüs ſtubbing
to Ruhbena-Gada un Manassus Zilti / fa
teem ſawo Brahtu Preck,châ apbruuxoteem
ja eet: 12.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "1. N tas notikkahs/pehz
Mohsus ta KUNGGL
Kalpa Mirfhanas/
tad ruñaja taș Kunse
us Josuüt / Nunna
Dehlu / Mohsus Sullaini/ un
ſazzija :
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Mans Kalps Mohsus irr
nomirris: Tad nu zellees/eij pah-
ri pahr fcho * Jardannu / tu/ un
wiſſifchee Landis/ us to Semmi/
fo es teem Iſraëta Behrneim
dohunn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Wiſſu Weetu/ kur juhs ſa-
wu Kahju ſperfeet/ eſmu es jums
dewis ; ittin ka es us Mohsu.eſ-
nu runnajis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. No tahs Tuſſneses/ un no
ſcha Lihbana lihdstni leelai Uppei/
tai Uppei Wrat ; wiſſa Eetitern
Semme / lihds tai leelai Juhrai/
prett Saules No-eefchanu laid
juhsas Rohbeschäs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "5. Neweens taivâ Preeſchâ
pastahwehs wiſſa tavâ Dshwi-
bas Laikâ : Ittin ka es ejimu ar
Mohsu biſts/ ta patt buhſchu es
Ggg
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
